title: Head Torch Rechargeable, [2 Pack] Super Bright 230° Wide Beam Adjustable Focus Headtorch, 30 Hrs Runtime, 8 Modes with Motion Sensor, Waterproof Lightweight Headlamp for Camping Running Fishing
features: Super Bright 230° Wide Beam & Adjustable Focus - Illuminate your path with the Demlaies head torch, featuring a super bright 230° wide beam for maximum visibility and adjustable focus for long distances. The zoomable design allows you to choose between a spotlight for focused light or a floodlight for wider areas, perfect for any situation.

Rechargeable & Long Battery Life - Enjoy up to 30 hours of continuous light with this rechargeable head torch. Fully charged in just 6 hours, it offers up to 16 hours on low spotlight and 6 hours on high floodlight. No more battery changes, just reliable illumination for all your adventures.

8 Light Modes & Motion Sensor - The led head torch offers 8 light modes, including COB High, COB Low, LED Floodlight High, LED Floodlight Low, LED Spotlight High, LED Spotlight Low, Red Light, Strobe, and Motion Sensor. Easily switch modes or turn off the light with a long press in any mode, without having to cycle through. In sensor mode, control the light with a simple hand wave.

Waterproof & Lightweight Design - Built to withstand all weather, the headlamp is waterproof and lightweight. Its durable construction ensures reliability, while the adjustable elastic headband provides comfort for both adults and kids. Ideal for everyday use in any condition.

Wide Application & Risk-Free Purchase - Perfect for running, camping, hiking, and fishing, the Demlaies multifunctional headtorch is your ideal outdoor companion. What you get: 2 head torches, 2 USB-C cables, 4 helmet clips, 4 hat clips, and a user manual.
